{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output identifies some prior work but doesn't deeply analyze the novelty compared to them.",
    "R1.7": "There are no explicit citations in the text, though it mentions related areas.",
    "RX.1": "The review highlights potential issues and uncertainties but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim.",
    "RX.3": "The review focuses on the scope of the work and its alignment with the provided context.",
    "RX.4": "The review does not identify any harmful content or regressions.",
    "RX.5": "The review lacks specific details about the source attribution and traceability of the proposed approach."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output identifies some prior work but doesn't deeply analyze the novelty compared to them.
rationale.R1.7: There are no explicit citations in the text, though it mentions related areas.
rationale.RX.1: The review highlights potential issues and uncertainties but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the scope of the work and its alignment with the provided context.
rationale.RX.4: The review does not identify any harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The review lacks specific details about the source attribution and traceability of the proposed approach.
